warning_text: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
notes: windows-mcp available (used CDP for precise input/mouse). Focused textarea, set text via Input.insertText, verified composer showed full prompt, then real CDP mouse click on span.ci-submit-button at (1247,328). SSE rendered the 차단 warning in the answer-container within ~3s. No transient blank; no retry needed. '보안 정책' visible end-to-end.
